steps.title: Close the interrupting phrase
steps.content: The phrase ratified in 1804 interrupts the main clause about the 12th Amendment separating the elections. Since the interruption opens with a comma after Amendment, it needs a matching comma after the year.

steps.title: Keep the punctuation paired
steps.content: Choice A uses a colon where no explanation or list follows. Choice C leaves the interrupting phrase unclosed. Choice D mismatches the opening comma with an em dash. The answer is B.
